title: Workspace name dialog centering and chat disconnect UX
description:
The workspace layout name editor is centered on screen instead of opening off in the corner. Ending a support chat posts “{User} disconnected” in the thread for the person still there, and their button changes from End chat to Close chat so they can dismiss the transcript.

Who is affected: PipeShare workspace tabs and support chat on BASE and SaaS.
changeLog: Center the workspace name / save-layout prompt on screen.
End chat posts “User disconnected” for the remaining participant.
Remaining participant sees Close chat to dismiss the conversation.
